zh.Rylstone, Yorkshire, England, United Kin: 英國英格蘭越可爾爾斯同

zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Alice Rilleston於大約1155年出生在英國越可爾爾斯同時，她的父親Elias de Rilston I4歲，母親Alice de Hebden4歲。她於1200年之前與Roger Tempest I結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1222年在英國越可爾布拉可維爾享年68歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Alice Rilleston于大约1155年出生在英国越可爾爾斯同时，她的父亲Elias de Rilston I4岁，母亲Alice de Hebden4岁。她于1200年之前与Roger Tempest I结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1222年在英国越可爾布拉可維爾享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: Rilleston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 1  English: locative name, in the Midlands from Rolleston (Leics, Notts, Staffs) and perhaps Rowston (Lincs); in ER Yorks from Rolston (or Rowlston) in Mappleton (ER Yorks); and in SW England from Rollestone in Upton Pyne, or Rolstone Barton in Morchard Bishop (both in Devon), or Rollestone (Wilts), and perhaps Rowlestone (Herefs). It is possible that some of the following bearers belong with (2), particularly the Yorks examples.

2 English: relationship name variant of Rollinson , reduced to Rolleson and altered by the addition of an intrusive -t-, as though it were a locative name in -ston. Compare Thomas Rolleson’, 1377 in Poll Tax (Kingston upon Hull, ER Yorks), and Christopher Rollston, 1723, Henry Rowlstone, 1763 in IGI (Kingston upon Hull, ER Yorks).

variants.name: Roulson
meanings: 1 English: chiefly a variant of Rolleston with the common reduction of -ston to -son.
2 English: relationship name occasionally perhaps from the Anglo-Norman French personal name Rolfe + -son, but this appears to have been a rare surname in the medieval period.

variants.name: Roulston
meanings: English (Leicestershire and Nottinghamshire): variant of   Rolston  .

variants.name: Rolston
meanings: habitational name either from Rolleston (Leicestershire, Nottinghamshire, Staffordshire) and perhaps Rowston (Lincolnshire), Rolston (or Rowlston) in Mappleton (East Yorkshire), or from Rollestone in Upton Pyne, or Rolstone Barton in Morchard Bishop (both in Devon), or Rollestone (Wiltshire), and perhaps Rowlestone (Herefordshire) or Rolstone in Banwell (Somerset). The placenames have various etymological origins, though most are named with the Middle English personal name Rolf or the Old Norse personal name Hrólfr + Middle English toun ‘town, settlement’, Old English tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. See Rolfe .
variant of Rollison , shortened to Rolleson and altered by the addition of an intrusive -t-, as though it were a habitational name in -ston.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Alice Rilleston was born about 1155, in Rylstone, Yorkshire, England, her father, Elias de Rilston I, was 4 and her mother, Alice de Hebden, was 4. She married Roger Tempest I before 1200. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1222, in Bracewell, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Alice Rilleston est née environ 1155, à Rylstone, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Elias de Rilston I, avait 4 ans et sa mère, Alice de Hebden, avait 4 ans. Elle a épousé Roger Tempest I avant 1200. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1222, à Bracewell, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Alice Rilleston um 1155 in Rylstone, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Elias de Rilston I 4 und ihre Mutter Alice de Hebden 4. Sie hat vor 1200 Roger Tempest I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1222 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Bracewell, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Alice Rilleston è nata il circa 1155 nel Rylstone, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Elias de Rilston I, aveva 4 anni e sua madre, Alice de Hebden, aveva 4 anni. Lei sposato Roger Tempest I prima del 1200. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1222, nel Bracewell, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Alice Rillestonが約1155年にイギリスヨークシュアイアリルストーンで生まれた時，父Elias de Rilston Iは4歳，母Alice de Hebdenは4歳であった。1200年以前にRoger Tempest Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1222年にイギリスヨークシュアイアブレイセウエルで68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Alice Rilleston(이)가 대략 1155년 영국 요르크실르 릴스톤에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Elias de Rilston I(은)는 4세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice de Hebden(은)는 4세였다. 그녀는 1200년 이전 Roger Tempest I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1222년 영국 요르크실르 브라스웰에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Alice Rilleston nasceu aproximadamente 1155, em Rylstone, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Elias de Rilston I, tinha 4 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Hebden, tinha 4 anos. Ela casou-se com Roger Tempest I antes 1200. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1222, em Bracewell, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 68 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Alice Rilleston родилась около 1155 г. в местности рилстоун, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Elias de Rilston I было 4 года, а матери, которую звали Alice de Hebden, 4. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger Tempest I перед 1200 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1222 г. в местности бреисюелл, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 68 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Alice Rilleston nació aproximadamente 1155, en Rylstone, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Elias de Rilston I, tenía 4 años y su mamá, Alice de Hebden, tenía 4 años. Se casó con Roger Tempest I antes de 1200. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1222, en Bracewell, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 68 años.
